com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration.DriftEstimator

    Package Description
    com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration  

    • Uses of DriftEstimator in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration

      Subclasses of DriftEstimator in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  KalmanDriftEstimator
      Estimates accumulated drift in body orientation, position and velocity per unit of time using an INS Kalman filtered solution.
      Fields in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration declared as DriftEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Field Description
      private DriftEstimator RandomWalkEstimator.mDriftEstimator
      Estimates amount of position, velocity and orientation drift.
      Methods in com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.calibration with parameters of type DriftEstimator 
      Modifier and Type Method Description
      void DriftEstimatorListener.onBodyKinematicsAdded​(DriftEstimator estimator, com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.BodyKinematics measuredKinematics, com.irurueta.navigation.inertial.BodyKinematics fixedKinematics)
      Called when a measured body kinematics sample is added containing new measured accelerometer and gyroscope measures.
      void DriftEstimatorListener.onReset​(DriftEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation is reset.
      void DriftEstimatorListener.onStart​(DriftEstimator estimator)
      Called when estimation starts for a single body kinematics measurement.
